headline: Keurig Dr Pepper Reshapes Coffee Stake And Tests Energy Drink Growth
summary: Keurig Dr Pepper (NasdaqGS:KDP) has accepted post closing tendered shares of JDE Peet's, moving ahead with statutory buy out proceedings. The process is expected to lead to the delisting of JDE Peet's from Euronext Amsterdam once the buy out is completed. Separately, Ghost Energy and Keurig Dr Pepper's 7UP brand have launched a limited edition 7UP Lemon Lime energy drink collaboration. Keurig Dr Pepper, which operates across coffee, soft drinks, and other beverages, is using the JDE Peet's...
